## Summary

Quality PARITY: worse-of-two L 20 / S 22 of 108, but the sign flips by grader (Claude S+1, GLM L+2) and 71% exact agreement, so P2 SUPPORTED. Final verdicts: P1 SPLIT (arm-S-flat falsified on W1), P2 supported, P3 untested (probes failed to discriminate), P4 partial. Evidence file carries M-quality tables, per-grader robustness, parse audit, updated caveat (LLM-only grading, no human/test verification), and the FINAL honest summary. D7 logged on refusing either single-grader reading. handoff-bench 4a2eb48.

## Next action
